nasb.text: But if you truly obey his voice and do all that I say, then I will be an enemy to your enemies and an adversary to your adversaries.

esv.text: “But if you carefully obey his voice and do all that I say, then I will be an enemy to your enemies and an adversary to your adversaries.

cnv.text: 如果你實在聽他的話，遵行我吩咐的一切，我就要作你仇敵的仇敵，作你敵人的敵人。

ccb.text: “你若认真听从他的吩咐，遵行我的话，我就与你的仇敌为敌，与你的对头作对。
